+%i:scaleCritMult% Critical Strike Damage
+%i:scaleHealth% Health and Increased Size
+%i:scaleAPen%  Armor Penetration
+%i:scaleMPen% Magic Penetration
+%i:scaleMS% Move Speed and Reduced Size
+%i:scaleTenacity% Tenacity
+%i:scaleHealShield% Heal & Shield Power
+%i:scaleSV% Omnivamp
+%i:goldCoins% Gold

In 4 rounds gain a %i:Augment% Silver Augment.

tooltip: Reduce the Attack Speed of nearby champions by @ASPDSlow*-100@%.

name: Swindler's Orb
desc: Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces their shields.
tooltip:
Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces any shields they have or gain by 40% for 3 seconds. 

Affects General and Physical Damage shields, but not purely Magical Damage blocking shields.
descRaw: Dealing damage to an enemy champion reduces their <shield>shields</shield>.

name: Wolf's Frenzy
desc:
Lose your innate revive. 

Increase your Health by 15%.

If you deal damage that would leave a champion below below 10% maximum health, execute them.
tooltip:
Lose your innate revive. 

Increase your Health by 15%.

descRaw:
Lose your innate revive.

Increase your Health by @HealthPercentageMod*100@%.

If you deal damage that would leave a champion below below @ExecuteThreshold*100@% maximum health, execute them.

name: Archmage
desc: Casting a spell refunds part of another random spell's cooldown.
tooltip: Casting a spell refunds another random spell's cooldown based on a portion of the original spell's cooldown.

name: Purist - Caster
desc: Convert bonus attack speed into ability haste and reduce total ability cooldowns.
tooltip: Convert all bonus attack speed into ability haste at 0.65 haste per 1% bonus attack speed. Total ability cooldowns are reduced by 10%.

name: Infinite Recursion
desc: Gain a large amount of ability haste that increases with champion takedowns.
tooltip: Gain 60 ability haste, increased by 3 each time you score a champion takedown.

name: High Roller

tooltip: Nearby enemies have a chance to drop Stat Anvils on death.
